heading: POWERS, DUTIES AND LIABILITIES OF CONSULAR OFFICERS GENERALLY
label: XIV POWERS, DUTIES AND LIABILITIES OF CONSULAR OFFICERS GENERALLY
notes: CodificationSubchapter was not enacted as a part of the Foreign Service Act of 1980 which comprises this chapter.
